heading: Grants to study parole or post-incarceration supervision violations and revocations
label: 60552 Grants to study parole or post-incarceration supervision violations and revocations
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 17552 of Title 42

children.heading: Grants authorized
children.label: a Grants authorized
children.text: From amounts made available to carry out this section, the Attorney General may make grants to States to study and to improve the collection of data with respect to individuals whose parole or post-incarceration supervision is revoked, and which such individuals represent the greatest risk to victims and community safety.

children.label: A
children.text: the number and type of parole or post-incarceration supervision violations that occur with the State;

children.label: B
children.text: the reasons for parole or post-incarceration supervision revocation;

children.label: C
children.text: the underlying behavior that led to the revocation; and

children.label: D
children.text: the term of imprisonment or other penalty that is imposed for the violation; and
provide the data described in paragraph (1) to the Bureau of Justice Statistics, in a form prescribed by the Bureau.

children.heading: Analysis
children.label: c Analysis
children.text: Any statistical analysis of population data under this section shall be conducted in accordance with the Federal Register Notice dated , relating to classification standards.October 30, 1997
